meta.purpose: Historical HPA row-level research log. This file is not a confirmed athlete history source of truth and must not mutate data/database.json automatically.
meta.promotionPolicy: Do not promote these rows into data/database.json unless identity, class/category, event date, event type, and official PDF row are unambiguous.

source.publisher: 北海道パワーリフティング協会

processedBatch.scope: Small safe row-level extraction for current PL Commentary Bank athlete-name candidates with clear official PDF rows only.
processedBatch.coreAppPriorityNote: Secondary historical research only; no app layout, runtime logic, data/database.json, or data/research-candidates.json changes were made.

nonMatches.result: 2021.pdf text extractionで同名一致行を確認できなかったため、この小ロットでは追加しない。別名・別人候補は流用しない。
2021-05-08 国体第7回北海道代表選考会の59Kg級に同名行はあるが欠席行のため、競技結果履歴としては追加しない。

notes: Official PDF text extraction was used for row-level evidence. Attempted PDF screenshots for pages 4, 5, 7, and 14, but the screenshot tool returned cache-miss errors; therefore this log relies on the official PDF parsed text lines only.
2021.pdf also contains other official events and athlete rows, but this small batch only logged clear rows matching current candidate names without expanding scope.
Rows remain historical research logs/candidates only. No automatic promotion into confirmed athlete histories is allowed from this file alone.
